name: 300 MG Paclitaxel Injection IP
about: 300 MG Paclitaxel Injection IP is a liquid drug type injection originating from India. It is used for the treatment of various types of cancer such as ovarian, breast, and lung cancer. The recommended dosage of the injection is 300 mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is important to store the injection in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness. This product is ideal for those who are looking for a reliable and effective solution to treat cancer.
